\tzpentry{ID5490}{Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5490 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} H_{\mathrm{sel}}(t) &= \sum_{i<j} J_{ij}(t)\,\sigma_i^z \sigma_j^z + \sum_i h_i(t)\,\sigma_i^x + \sum_i \Delta_i\,\sigma_i^y. \end{align}
